risk.desc: Risk of misalignment due to insufficient datum features.
risk.mit: Add primary datum features and ensure all interfaces have clear alignment keys.

risk.desc: Risk of improper cable routing due to lack of visible harness raceways.
risk.mit: Ensure all harnesses are routed through visible raceways or protected channels.

risk.desc: Risk of assembly errors due to ambiguous assembly sequence.
risk.mit: Define a clear assembly sequence with tool, torque, and datum per step.

risk.desc: Risk of structural weakness due to insufficient internal stiffening.
risk.mit: Add internal stiffening features such as ribs or channels.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal management issues due to lack of thermal management features.
risk.mit: Include thermal management features such as heat sinks or thermal barriers.
